title: Man charged with rape and murder appears in regional court
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The man accused of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The man accused of stabbing a 42-year-old mother of five 19 times in her KwaNonqaba home in November appeared in the Mossel Bay Regional Court on Monday 29 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The man accused of stabbing a 42-year-old mother of five 19 times in her KwaNonqaba home in November appeared in the Mossel Bay Regional Court on Monday 29 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The accused, who had also been charged with the rape of the same woman in October last year, cannot be named until he pleads."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He was arrested late in October on the rape charge and had been released on bail of R800. On 11 November, the man allegedly went to the woman’s house and stabbed her 19 times, leaving her in a critical condition.","html":"He was arrested late in October on the rape charge and had been released on bail of R800. On 11 November, the man allegedly went to the woman’s house and stabbed her 19 times, leaving her in a critical condition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He was arrested on an attempted murder charge shortly afterwards, however, this was changed to murder after the woman died from her injuries in the Groote Schuur Hospital in Cape Town on 10 December.","html":"He was arrested on an attempted murder charge shortly afterwards, however, this was changed to murder after the woman died from her injuries in the Groote Schuur Hospital in Cape Town on 10 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The rape case and murder case were joined together on 22 July and are now being heard in the regional court. The accused remains behind bars and is set to appear in court again on 13 October.","html":"The rape case and murder case were joined together on 22 July and are now being heard in the regional court. The accused remains behind bars and is set to appear in court again on 13 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Woman stabbed 19 times: Accused back in court","Man in court for rape and murder of woman","Woman stabbed 19 times, man arrested","Ma wat 19 keer met mes gesteek is, steeds in intensiewe eenheid"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Man charged with rape and murder appears in regional court
